author: entotus
orig: jeśli wszystkie białe zapełnione i nie umiesz zbierać białych
en: if all the whites are full and you can't collect the whites
pt: se todas as claras estiverem cheias e você não conseguir coletá-las
label: suspicious

context.author: apeks001
context.orig: i 2 pytanie gdzie sie skrzynki otwiera bo pokazuje ze je dostaje a ich nie mam
context.en: and the 2nd question is where to open the boxes because it shows that I get them but I don't have them
context.pt: e a 2ª pergunta é onde abrir as caixas porque mostra que as recebo mas não as tenho

context.author: kajzerka0657
context.orig: O co chodzi z tym, że nie otwierając zwykłych chestów ma się większą szansę na niebieską? Przecież niebieska i tak tylko na koniec poziomu może wypaść? Jakiś zboostowany przez to % jest ?
context.en: What's the deal with the fact that by not opening regular chests you have a greater chance of getting the blue one? After all, the blue one can only appear at the end of the level anyway? Is there some % boosted by this?
context.pt: Qual é o problema com o fato de que ao não abrir baús normais você tem mais chances de conseguir o azul? Afinal, o azul só pode aparecer no final da fase mesmo? Existe alguma% impulsionada por isso?

context.author: entotus
context.orig: bo wszystkie chesty mają interwałna 7 minut
context.en: because all chests have an interval of 7 minutes
context.pt: pois todos os baús tem intervalo de 7 minutos
context.label: clean

context.author: entotus
context.orig: to gra bedzie ci probowala sboyc inne
context.en: then the game will try to make you different ones
context.pt: então o jogo tentará torná-lo diferente
context.label: clean

context.author: kajzerka0657
context.orig: a czyli jak spadnie zwykła to przez 7 min  żadna inna nie spada ?
context.en: so when a regular one falls, no other falls for 7 minutes?
context.pt: então, quando um normal cai, nenhum outro cai por 7 minutos?

context.author: entotus
context.en: and you have a cycle of 21 minutes
context.pt: e você tem um ciclo de 21 minutos
context.label: clean
